title: Tracheostomy weaning–survival paradox: four coupled physiological models
description: MATLAB implementation of four coupled low-dimensional models explaining why tracheostomy shortens mechanical ventilation without changing survival: lumped-parameter respiratory mechanics (Model 1), two-compartment CO2 kinetics (Model 1b), a load-capacity saddle-node bifurcation (Model 2), and ventilator-induced diaphragmatic dysfunction capacity dynamics (Model 2b). Fully reproducible via `matlab -batch "runAll"`: 121 unit tests, 19 experiments, auto-generated summary documents, and per-parameter evidence grades (docs/CALIBRATION.md). Accompanies the manuscript of the same title.

creators.name: Hsieh, Ming-Yu
creators.affiliation: Chung Shan Medical University Hospital, Taichung, Taiwan

notes: Requires MATLAB R2025b with the Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox and the Optimization Toolbox. No network access required. The related manuscript DOI must be added once the article is published.
